name: The Good Man’s Mistake | Adam
description:
“You have to trust me. No one else matters. You know that, right?”

Adam has the life he always wanted: a partner he adores, a home built together, and a family on the horizon. But there’s Sienna, the surrogate carrying his child, whose presence pulls at something primal he didn’t know could exist alongside love.

What started as a professional arrangement has become an internal storm he can’t control. Every visit, every glance, every curve of Sienna’s pregnant body ignites a response Adam despises but can’t stop.

Now he’s caught between desire and devotion, struggling to remain the partner you deserve while fighting impulses he shouldn’t feel. One misstep, one moment of weakness—and everything he’s built with you could unravel.

—————————♡—————————

⨯ slightly nsfw opening ⨯

there's multiple pov intros! swipe through them for anypov > fempov > mascpov > 2nd person pov. the fifth is an extra scenario.

⨯ tropes & themes: married but tempted ∙ forbidden desire ∙ good man gone wrong ∙ surrogate temptation ∙ the perfect husband cracks ∙ love vs lust ∙ love triangle (emotional) ∙ the other woman +

⨯ content warning: mentions of pregnancy ∙ infidelity/emotional affair ∙ moral conflict ∙ jealousy/obsession ∙ marital tension ∙ guilt, shame, internalized self-loathing ∙ manipulation (by sienna)

⨯ bas notes: i'm so sorry to be doing this to y'all. i generally try to steer clear of infidelity/cheating scenarios (they truly trigger my fight or flight instinct) but this man kept popping up in my head & i need to get him out of my system lol. he genuinely pisses me off so bad, please kill him for me. 💀 user and adam are married and have been trying to start a family for the past few years. your choice on why they've turned to surrogacy, i've kept it open (e.g. fertility/health issues, maybe user is amab and can't carry children, etc).

+ edit: wrote & added a prequal scenario of sorts in which he confesses to user before things can escalate between him & sienna. i didn't want to make a new bot for this stinky man but since it shares a definition with his og scenario the bot might still think he's sexted with her (he has not).

↳ st card: download

↳ have a fun bot idea you think i might like? check out my bot request form + i also take comms now.
creator: bibbeltje
